0.q: PdbUNE12 improves the osmotic regulation and reactive oxygen species (ROS) scavenging capacity of the plants by increasing the activity of defense enzymes such as peroxidase (POD), superoxide dismutase (SOD).

1.q: PdbUNE12 can regulate the salt tolerance gene PdbbHLH1 by binding to its promoter.

2.q: PdbUNE12 improves the osmotic regulation and reactive oxygen species (ROS) scavenging capacity of the plants by increasing the activity of defense enzymes such as peroxidase (POD), superoxide dismutase (SOD).

3.q: PdbUNE12 is a key regulator of salt stress tolerance by enhancing the expression of relevant resistance genes... downstream gene, PdbbHLH1, which has the same function.
